questions.question: 4 (a) Show that the volume, V cm 3 , of the doorknob is given by V = Kxxx x22 0 4 816−+ () ∫ ed where K is a constant to be found. (3) (b) Hence, find the exact value of the volume of the doorknob. Give your answer in the form pπ (e q + r) cm 3 where p, q and r are simplified rational numbers to be found. (5) _________________________________________________________
